Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product listings, promotions, and brake part details to use as source material for email content.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Sends the completed Excel catalog file to Mark as an email attachment, ready for use with the special markets customer.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers a complete, accurate, and formatted catalog directly to Mark's inbox in minutes instead of requiring manual lookup and document creation.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Queries Dream ERP for live inventory status on every part in the weekly backorder report, retrieving on-hand quantity, on-order status, and in-transit data for each line item.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a process where a dozen people independently look up the same parts, consolidating all status lookups into a single automated pull in seconds.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches each line of the backorder report with the live Dream status data and flags any parts with no on-hand, on-order, or in-transit source as dead-end items requiring escalation.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a raw backorder list into a fully enriched, prioritized action report — giving the team immediate clarity on what can be fulfilled and what cannot.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for affected orders — providing status updates, estimated timelines, or escalation notices based on each part's inventory situation.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Gives the team ready-to-send customer emails in one step, eliminating the manual drafting burden across a large backorder list and ensuring customers are proactively updated.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract all two-piece rotor listings including make, model, year fitment, part numbers, and specifications.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Builds a comprehensive competitive catalog reference in minutes that would require days of manual browsing and data entry across three separate vendor sites.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor fitment data against DFC's existing parts inventory to identify coverage matches, gaps, and potential new product opportunities.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly reveals where DFC is competitive and where it has no product, turning weeks of manual comparison into an actionable gap analysis.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to customers or prospects to gather demand data on specific two-piece rotor fitments identified as gaps or high-opportunity items.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Generates real demand signal from customers before committing to inventory decisions, replacing guesswork with data-backed sourcing.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped catalog data, cross-reference results, and customer demand responses into a single formatted reference sheet delivered to Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gives Dino one clean, decision-ready document covering the full two-piece rotor landscape — without manual compilation from multiple sources.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad copy across campaigns and ad sets, extracting the full text of every headline, description, and body copy field for scanning.
Meta Investigation.impact: Instantly retrieves the complete universe of live ad copy without requiring manual export or platform-by-platform searching.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans every pulled ad copy field for specified phrases or flagged language patterns and produces a structured list of every match with the exact field, ad name, and copy excerpt where it was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Surfaces every instance of a flagged phrase across hundreds of ads in seconds, providing the precise location and context needed to act immediately.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a formatted flagged-copy report to the requestor listing every match with the ad name, platform, field type, and exact copy excerpt.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a ready-to-act compliance or editorial report directly to the right person, eliminating the need to manually review every active ad.

Paid Channel Chat bot.action: Connects to live Meta and TikTok ad account data — including campaign performance, spend, impressions, CTR, and creative details — to serve as the real-time data source for the chatbot.
Paid Channel Chat bot.impact: Gives the chatbot access to current, accurate paid channel data so every answer reflects what's actually happening in the accounts right now.

Paid Channel Chat bot.action: Receives natural-language questions about paid channel performance and answers them using the live Meta and TikTok data — interpreting trends, comparing campaigns, and surfacing insights on demand.
Paid Channel Chat bot.impact: Allows any team member to get instant, plain-English answers about ad performance without needing to know how to navigate the platforms or pull reports manually.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@ inbox for incoming applications, extracts attached resume PDFs, and files them into organized folders in Google Drive by role or candidate name.
Resume Bot.impact: Eliminates manual inbox triage and file saving, ensuring every application is captured and stored consistently without human touch.

Resume Bot.action: Reads each resume and scores the candidate against the requirements of open roles, producing a fit score and written rationale, and flags the application as approved, denied, or pending based on role availability.
Resume Bot.impact: Replaces hours of manual resume screening with consistent, criteria-based evaluations delivered instantly for every applicant regardless of volume.

Resume Bot.action: Sends automated reply emails to candidates — rejection notices for denied applicants, missing-resume prompts for incomplete submissions, and holding messages for paused-role applicants.
Resume Bot.impact: Ensures every candidate receives a timely, professional response without the recruiting team manually drafting and sending individual emails.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every candidate with their score, decision, role, resume link, and reply status to a dashboard sheet — with paused-role candidates automatically routed to a separate Pending tab.
Resume Bot.impact: Creates a live hiring dashboard that gives the recruiting team full visibility into every applicant, decision, and pending candidate without any manual data entry.

summary: The AI automation pipeline continues to grow strong, with 56 total agents now tracked — 29 completed, 10 in progress, and 17 planned. There were no new agents added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages. While things were quiet on the surface, the depth of what's already live and actively running across email, paid media, creator outreach, SEO, and operations reflects an incredible amount of momentum built over the past several weeks. The team should feel great about where this program stands — nearly half the full pipeline is complete and delivering value every day!
